title.en: As a result, his Xuan Xuan Secret was still at ...

content.en:
After the Void Heaven Dao Body was inscribed with 22 Dao patterns, Ye Tian did not continue to collect Chaos Divine Powers, but concentrated on cultivating the Void Technique.

In the past hundreds of thousands of years, he has hardly cultivated the Xuanxu Technique, completely because he has concentrated on cultivating the Chaos Divine Power, the Formation of the Condensation Dao, and the Inscription Dao Pattern, where does he have time to cultivate the Xuanxu Technique.

As a result, his Xuan Xuan Secret was still at the seventh level of entry.

In fact, the seventh layer of the Xuanxuan Technique belongs to the Heavenly Mandate Chapter, and it is the Chaos Body Refining Secret Technique cultivated in the Heavenly Mandate Realm, but Ye Tian is not an ordinary person, and ordinary Heavenly Mandate Realm powerhouses are also like ants in his eyes.

Because of this, he was able to cultivate the seventh layer of the Xuanxu Technique, which was the Heavenly Mandate Chapter.

But with his current cultivation, it was very difficult to cultivate the seventh layer of the Xuanxuan Void Technique, but after achieving the Void Heaven Dao Body, his cultivation was much simpler.

If he didn't have the Void Heaven Dao Body, it would be a hundred times more difficult for him to cultivate the Profound Void Secret Heavenly Mandate Chapter.

Ye Tian has a lot of resources on his body, and he has obtained obsidian gold veins, which can be exchanged for a large number of resources to assist Xuanxuan Jue.

Therefore, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was very fast, and the Xuanxuan Technique was improving little by little.

Ten thousand and ten thousand years passed, and finally in the sixth ten thousand years, Ye Tian cultivated the Xuanxuan Jue to the seventh-layer Dacheng realm, and his physical body became more terrifying, and his strength was one step closer, reaching the eight-star late stage god general realm.

It's a pity that it is more difficult for the Xuanxu Jue to progress further, after all, the Mandate of Heaven chapter is actually only three layers, Ye Tian has not broken through to the Mandate of Heaven realm, it is too difficult to advance the Xuanxu Jue to the eighth layer, even if it is advanced to the seventh layer of the consummation realm, it is a very difficult thing, and he wants many opportunities and rare resources against the sky.

But today's big universe lacks this resource, and other people don't necessarily have it.

If Ye Tian can leave the Great Universe, he can slowly look for it in the chaos, but unfortunately he can't leave.

Because of this, some of the truly top geniuses are not necessarily willing to enter the Great Universe, and once they enter the Great Universe, they lose the opportunity to find opportunities in Chaos.

Otherwise, some of the eight-star gods in the chaos might also venture into the great universe.

Dao ancestors like Yun Zi Divine Maiden dared to enter the Great Universe in the first batch, undoubtedly giving up many things, which was beyond the expectations of other forces.

The Yunzi Divine Maiden dared to do this, but other Dao ancestors might not dare to do so.

Although Ye Tian is a Dao ancestor, he is an exception because he is a native creature of the Great Universe.

Tens of thousands of years have passed, and Ye Tian's progress is very slow, and it can even be said that there is not much progress.

At this time, Ye Tian was a little impatient.

"It's too difficult to cultivate, and there has been no progress for so long!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But soon, he adjusted his mentality.

"That's right, in the chaos, countless geniuses can't hit the eight-star god generals, even if it is passed down by the Dao Ancestor himself, there are countless opportunities, and it will take tens of millions of years to improve a little strength. And the fact that I was able to hit the eight-star late-stage god general in such a short period of time is enough to make others terrified!"

Thinking like this, Ye Tian calmed down again.

However, this does not mean that he is not motivated, he still wants to improve his strength in a short period of time.

"Let's go to the Ancient Demon Tower, I haven't been there for a long time, this time I should be able to break through the thirteenth floor!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

If he breaks through the thirteenth floor of the Ancient Demon Tower, then the Ancient Demon Tower will be his!

A top-notch super-grade Supreme Treasure second only to the Chaos Arcana, and perhaps even a stronger Arcana, is also very valuable to him.

Even if he doesn't need it, he can put it in the Terran in the future, for the use of the Terran geniuses, and it can increase the strength of the Terran Race.

Ancient Demon Cave.

This was originally the territory of the Cangyu Universe, but now the Twin Universes have become a large universe, and they have expanded countless times, and the area where the Ancient Demon Cave is located has also become an ownerless area.

However, the Ancient Demon Cave was still occupied by major forces, one of which was the Void Heaven Temple.

And the original holy lands that occupied the ancient demon cave were not qualified to continue to stay in the ancient demon cave, after all, the strength of those holy places was too poor, and the strongest ones only had the strength of three or four star god generals at most, which was similar to an ant in the eyes of the big foreign forces.

And Ye Tian, as the Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven lineage, could naturally enter the Ancient Demon Cave for free, and no one dared to stop him.

At the entrance of the Ancient Demon Cave, a six-star god will guard here.

After all, it's just a supreme treasure, plus an ordinary treasure land, and the major forces don't care, and sending a six-star god to guard here is already a big deal.

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws!"

When the six-star god general saw Ye Tian coming, he immediately said respectfully.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, and entered the Ancient Demon Cave.

Then, Ye Tian entered the Ancient Demon Tower and came directly to the twelfth floor.

Before, his physical body was not strong, and he did not break through the twelfth layer.

But now his physical body is so terrifying, he has broken through the twelfth layer in an instant, and has come to the last layer of the Ancient Demon Tower, the thirteenth floor.

Whoa!!

Ten ancient demons appeared, besieging Ye Tian, each of them was extremely powerful in flesh, and his combat skills were also extremely superb.

If it was Ye Tian, there was really no way to fight against these ten ancient demons, but now there was hope to defeat them.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian held a long knife in his hand, and fought with the ten ancient demons with the power of his supreme flesh and unimaginable combat skills, from being slightly weak at the beginning, to gradually controlling the overall situation and occupying the advantage.

Half an hour later.

Ye Tian killed an ancient demon, completely causing a crushing momentum.

Soon, all the ten ancient demons were killed by Ye Tian and broke through the thirteenth floor of the Ancient Demon Tower.

Then.

The pure Ancient Demon Essence appeared and was absorbed by Ye Tian, but it didn't improve much in strength.

After all, this Ancient Demon Essence Yuan was no longer a treasure, so it naturally couldn't attract Ye Tian.

Wow!

Ye Tian appeared in a large hall, which was the core inner hall of the Ancient Demon Tower.

Here, Ye Tian saw the spirit of the Ancient Demon Tower.

The spirit of the Ancient Demon Tower looked small, only the size of a doll, but its eyes were full of wisdom.

"Assessor, you have passed the thirteenth layer of the Ancient Demon Tower, and you are qualified to refine the Ancient Demon Tower and become the master of my Gunuo!" said the spirit of the Ancient Demon Tower.

"How to refine?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This is the core of the Ancient Demon Tower, you can control the Ancient Demon Tower by refining it!"

Gounod Road.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded, but there was not much excitement.

He has obtained so much obsidian, even the strongest treasure is not qualified to make him too excited, a mere extreme treasure can only be regarded as a small gain, ready to be thrown to the human race in the future, where will there be any big surprises.

Soon, Ye Tian completely refined the core of the Ancient Demon Tower.

However, after refining and controlling the Ancient Demon Tower, his expression changed, and there were endless surprises.

"The Ancient Demon Tower turned out to be ......"
